pi_items.source: Code verification: setup_task.sh line 44, export_result.sh line 22, verifier.py line 36 default
Code verification: setup_task.sh line 18 hardcoded ROOM_NAME variable
Code verification: task_utils.sh line 4 default JITSI_BASE_URL, docker-compose.yml line 7 port mapping, setup_jitsi.sh line 84

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic test task for Jitsi Meet. The task configures a user profile email to 'alex.manager@corp.global' in a test meeting room named 'ManagementSync' running on a local Jitsi instance at http://localhost:8080. All three metadata values (expected_email, room_name, jitsi_url) are hardcoded synthetic values used for testing and are correctly specified in the task definition. The email address and room name are fabricated test values, and the Jitsi URL points to a locally-running Docker-based Jitsi Meet instance.
